market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 is fully underway with ongoing preview days at the HKCEC, building on strong momentum from the newly confirmed 5-year hosting agreement. International collector interest remains focused on established blue-chip artists as a defensive strategy against global economic uncertainty.
keyTrends: Strong collector preference for established blue-chip artists to retain asset value
Market confidence boosted by the confirmed 5-year Art Basel Hong Kong extension
High engagement in the newly introduced 'Zero 10' digital art sector
HKCEC remains a central international art trading hub
High visibility for large-scale works in the 'Encounters' sector

highlights: Strategic News: 5-year Art Basel host agreement finalized on March 25
Featured Initiatives: 'Echoes' sector, Asia debut of 'Zero 10' digital art, Encounters sector
Special Presentation: Robert Rauschenberg BMW Art Car World Tour
Public Art: Shahzia Sikander animation on the M+ Facade
